# Lambda Invocation

Example Lambda invocations, successful and unsuccessful responses, are provided below:

## Example Lambda invocation:

```
aws lambda invoke --function-name serverless-tls-cert-prod --cli-binary-format raw-in-base64-out --payload '{"common_name":"test-client-cert", "country":"GB", "locality":"London", "organization":"Example Company", "organizational_unit":"DevOps", "lifetime":90, "sans":["example.com"], "base64_csr_data":""}' lambda-response.json
```
## Lambda Invocation - successful response

```
{"CertificateInfo": {"CommonName": "test-client-cert", "SerialNumber": "245479580729805944664768000279491299793077473212", "Issued": "2026-03-19 20:53:18", "Expires": "2026-06-17 20:58:18"}, "Base64Certificate": "", "Subject": "ST=New York,OU=DevOps,O=Example Company,L=London,C=GB,CN=test-client-cert", "Base64IssuingCaCertificate": "", "Base64RootCaCertificate": "", "Base64CaChain": ""}
```

## Lambda Invocation - unsuccessful response

```
{"error": "Private key has already been used for a certificate"}
```

## Lambda invocation - further information

A list of supported inputs is provided in the [Lambda submodule documentation](https://github.com/serverless-ca/terraform-aws-ca/blob/main/modules/terraform-aws-ca-lambda/README.MD).

Additional supported values are detailed in [Advanced certificate settings](certificate-settings.md).
